name: Mattermost Trello Bot
description: Integrates Mattermost with Trello via AI-powered bots that create and manage cards from chat threads.

settings_schema.header: Configure the Mattermost Trello Bot. Each bot maps to a specific Trello board and list. See the README for setup instructions.

settings.help_text: Your Anthropic API key (starting with sk-ant-...). Used by Claude to generate Trello card titles, descriptions, and checklists.
The Claude model ID to use for card generation. Leave blank to use the default (claude-sonnet-4-6). Example: claude-opus-4-6
Maximum number of tokens Claude may use per response. Leave blank to use the default (1024). Increase if bots with long context need longer card descriptions.

Optional. Free-text context injected into every Anthropic call across all bots, before any per-bot context. Use this to provide company-wide background — e.g. your company name, product overview, or terminology. The core JSON-output instructions are always preserved and cannot be overridden here.

A JSON array mapping bot usernames to Trello boards. Required fields per entry: botUsername, botDisplayName, trelloApiKey, trelloApiToken, trelloBoardId, trelloListId. Optional field: botContext (free-text describing this bot's role, personality, or style — appended after Global Context in every Anthropic call made by this bot). Example: [{"botUsername": "therealpritish", "botDisplayName": "Pritish Bot", "trelloApiKey": "...", "trelloApiToken": "...", "trelloBoardId": "...", "trelloListId": "...", "botContext": "This bot handles engineering bugs. Be concise and technical."}]
